elements.original_description: A simple balance scale with two identical gold coins on each side, perfectly level and symmetrical, against a pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A professional 2D minimalist icon of a simple balance scale with two identical gold coins on each side, perfectly level and symmetrical. Clean flat vector art on a pure white background, high contrast, no shading or gradients, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks. Neutral mood.
